title: ProDec Advance Lightweight 3.2m x 3.2m Non-Woven Dust Sheet Dustproof and Waterproof Ideal for Covering and Protecting Floors and Furniture from Spills and Splashes When Painting and Decorating
features: Protects surfaces against paint, liquid spills, dust and dirt
Lightweight, tear-resistant non-woven fabric with a waterproof coating to prevent paint tread-through
Cost effective alternative to cotton dust sheets and re-usable (not machine washable)
3.2 m x 3.2 m (10'6 Inch x 10'6 Inch)
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Lightweight temporary protection at great value Ideal for light duty trade and DIY jobs, this lightweight dust sheet is a great alternative to heavier cotton sheets and is stronger than polythene sheets. Made from tear-resistant, non-woven fabric and with a slightly larger surface area than a standard 12x9 dust sheet, it features a waterproof coating that protects against liquid spills such as paint, preventing tread-through to carpets and hard floors, as well as protecting furniture, fixtures, worktops and much more against dirt, dust and general debris. It's easier to handle than cotton sheets and as it's lightweight it drapes well over furniture. It can also be taped using standard masking tape if you want to secure it in place, for example attaching to skirting boards. The sheet can be easily folded, stored and re-used, although unlike cotton dust sheets it's not machine washable. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
